assertions.name: swim_day_consistency
assertions.expected: swim_day_raw constant across day (ignoring transient unavailable)

assertions.name: log_cadence
assertions.observed: 143 gaps, mean 10.0 min, out-of-spec 0.0% (0), max gap 10.0 min

assertions.name: sensor_availability
assertions.expected: no critical sensor unavailable >30 cumulative min (water_temp exempt while pump is off — sensor settles only with flow)

assertions.name: waterfall_opens_at_start
assertions.expected: closed→open transition near 08:00 on swim days

assertions.name: waterfall_closes_at_end
assertions.expected: open→closed transition near 20:00 if waterfall opened today

assertions.name: swim_day_pump_window
assertions.expected: pump on through swim-day filtration window

assertions.name: nonswim_day_pump_off
assertions.expected: pump off ≥95% of day on non-swim days

assertions.name: pump_speed_when_heating
assertions.expected: pump_speed ≥ 65% on heater-active time_pattern rows; first heater-active row of each run skipped (race: logger snapshot at same instant blueprint fires, before pump-speed command lands)
assertions.observed: all heater-active time_pattern rows had pump at heater speed (post-first)

assertions.name: pump_speed_when_idle
assertions.expected: pump_speed ≤ 55% on idle time_pattern rows; first idle row after each heater run skipped (race: pump-speed-down command lands after the time_pattern snapshot at the same instant)
assertions.observed: idle pump always within speed limit on time_pattern checks (post-first)

assertions.name: heater_state_matches_swim_day
assertions.expected: heater on iff swimming_day; allow 1 mismatch in first 10 min
assertions.observed: heater state matches swim_day (True) all day

assertions.name: heater_active_implies_pump_on
assertions.expected: when heater actively delivering, pump must be on

assertions.name: omnilogic_local_uptime
assertions.reason: needs omnilogic_local_last_update_success column (not in phase 1 schema)
